expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?
turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":1},"children":["🇹🇿 Let's get this Tanzania trip under control"]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["I've read through everything you sent — the notes file, the costs spreadsheet, the Ngorongoro park-fee PDF, your Stone Town photo, and the voice memo from the crater. Here's a quick inventory of what you're carrying around right now:"]},{"type":"Panel","props":{"title":"What you've got scattered across six places"},"children":[{"type":"List","props":{"items":["📝 **Trip notes** (tanzaniamemories.md) — itinerary, contacts, names, logistics","💰 **Costs spreadsheet** (trip-costs.xlsx) — all the numbers, payments made and owed","🏞️ **Ngorongoro park-fee PDF** — official tariff rules, fees, categories","📸 **Stone Town photo** — that beautiful courtyard shot with the arched balconies","🎙️ **Voice memo from the crater** — Emmanuel the driver-guide, Maasai bracelets for Athina Mari (~TZS 35,000), the surprise ranger tip (~TZS 5,000), and the reminder to ask Richard before the safari balance payment"]},"children":[]}]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["The problem isn't that you don't have the info — it's that it's in five different file types and one recording, and none of it surfaces when you actually need it on your phone at a gate or a hotel counter. That's exactly what this project can fix."]},{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"info","title":"Here's what I'd propose"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":[{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["One app"]}," with your trip costs, contacts, park-fee rules, itinerary notes, and the photo all in one place — openable on your phone at ",{"type":"Code","props":{},"children":["/app/tanzania-trip-organising/"]},". I'd also split the material into ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["three specialist topic spaces"]}," — Ngorongoro/Serengeti, Zanzibar/Stone Town, and the trip finances — so that later when you ask \"what's the crater entry fee for a non-resident?\" or \"what did I actually pay for those bracelets?\" it answers from your own material instead of shrugging."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Want me to put all of this together for you?"]}]}]}
